title: 有個Agent打黎叫我in Manulife Business Development officer...

replies.msg: 是咁的 Linkedin有個agent打黎叫我in Manulife既Business development officer, 話係觀塘鴻圖道 in, 但上網搵過好似係一間叫同人Peoples ge公司條友聲稱唔使Sell保險 有無伏
Job title 咁虛無飄渺，巴打小心啲好
叫佢比jd
No
鴻圖道太荒謬
唔洗sell保險 但要recruit

replies.msg:
我絲
好似話係宏利金融大廈3樓...唔知同Manulife有無關係？但個agent又答唔到我實質係做乜
睇返個Job description 話

Business Planning to develop and execute strategies in order to increase sales and profits. To identify profitable business opportunities, secure sound business deals, and lead business development associates.

Assist Team Manager to formula business plan to develop agency force’s competencies and to drive their activity and productivity

Implement and promote agency/ company initiatives through collaboration with various departments and agency force to achieve business target

Support agency/ company events from planning to execution

Prepare and conduct presentation to communicate company information to agency force

Monitor agency production progress and follow-up with managers

Produce regular reports on agency contest and performance for agency and management review

好似伏伏地
